name: severity resolver: array config [severity, ...options] passes options to rule.create context
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule trace-options --config '["error",{"max":3}]' --in "$PWD/file.js" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E 'options=\\[\\{\"max\":3\\}\\]' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
